posts.author: julioherreradei (Julio Herrera Via Dei Velutini)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m Julio Herrera from Via Dei Velutini, Italia. I’m seeking to automate the delivery of dashboard reports via email in Monday.com and would also appreciate guidance on setting up workflows for averaging numbers across multiple subitems. Additionally, I need help automating status changes on subitems based on the due dates of parent items and resolving issues such as erroneous upgrade messages that appear when accessing a board. Could you provide best practices for implementing these automations and managing two-way automated status changes between linked boards?
